status.sql: SELECT f."repo_name", c."content" FROM "db"."GITHUB_REPOS"."SAMPLE_FILES" f JOIN "db"."GITHUB_REPOS"."SAMPLE_CONTENTS" c ON f."id" = c."id" WHERE f."path" ILIKE '%.py' OR f."path" ILIKE '%.r';
solved_subquestions_list: Join SAMPLE_FILES and SAMPLE_CONTENTS filtering for files ending with '.py' or '.r'.

status.sql: SELECT f."repo_name", c."content" FROM "GITHUB_REPOS"."SAMPLE_FILES" f JOIN "GITHUB_REPOS"."SAMPLE_CONTENTS" c ON f."id" = c."id" WHERE f."path" ILIKE '%.py' OR f."path" ILIKE '%.r';
solved_subquestions_list: Join SAMPLE_FILES and SAMPLE_CONTENTS filtering for files ending with '.py' or '.r'.

status.sql:
SELECT CASE WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.py' THEN 'Python' ELSE 'R' END AS "language", /* Extracting language type */
       COUNT(CASE WHEN c."content" ILIKE '%import %' OR c."content" ILIKE 'from % import %' THEN SPLIT_PART(c."content", ' ', 2) END) AS "module_count" /* Counting Python modules */,
       COUNT(CASE WHEN c."content" ILIKE 'library(%' THEN SPLIT_PART(c."content", '(', 1) END) AS "library_count" /* Counting R libraries */
FROM "GITHUB_REPOS"."SAMPLE_FILES" f
JOIN "GITHUB_REPOS"."SAMPLE_CONTENTS" c ON f."id" = c."id"
WHERE f."path" ILIKE '%.py' OR f."path" ILIKE '%.r'
GROUP BY "language" ORDER BY "language", "module_count" DESC;
solved_subquestions_list: Join SAMPLE_FILES and SAMPLE_CONTENTS filtering for files ending with '.py' or '.r'.
Extract and count Python modules and R libraries from the content.

status.sql:
SELECT CASE WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.py' THEN 'Python' ELSE 'R' END AS "language", /* Extracting language type */
       COUNT(CASE WHEN c."content" ILIKE '%import %' OR c."content" ILIKE 'from % import %' THEN SPLIT_PART(c."content", ' ', 2) END) AS "module_count" /* Counting Python modules */,
       COUNT(CASE WHEN c."content" ILIKE 'library(%' THEN SPLIT_PART(c."content", '(', 1) END) AS "library_count" /* Counting R libraries */
FROM "GITHUB_REPOS"."SAMPLE_FILES" f
JOIN "GITHUB_REPOS"."SAMPLE_CONTENTS" c ON f."id" = c."id"
WHERE f."path" ILIKE '%.py' OR f."path" ILIKE '%.r'
GROUP BY "language" ORDER BY "module_count" DESC, "library_count" DESC;
solved_subquestions_list: Join SAMPLE_FILES and SAMPLE_CONTENTS filtering for files ending with '.py' or '.r'.
Extract and count Python modules and R libraries from the content.

status.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT CASE WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.py' THEN 'Python' END AS "language", /* Extracting language type */
       SPLIT_PART(c."content", ' ', 2) AS "module_name" /* Extracting module names from import statements */
FROM "GITHUB_REPOS"."SAMPLE_FILES" f
JOIN "GITHUB_REPOS"."SAMPLE_CONTENTS" c ON f."id" = c."id"
WHERE f."path" ILIKE '%.py' AND (c."content" ILIKE '%import %' OR c."content" ILIKE 'from % import %');
solved_subquestions_list: Join SAMPLE_FILES and SAMPLE_CONTENTS filtering for files ending with '.py' or '.r'.
Extract and count Python modules and R libraries from the content.

status.sql:
SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN c."content" ILIKE 'library(%' THEN SPLIT_PART(c."content", '(', 1) END) AS "library_count" /* Counting R libraries */,
       f."repo_name"
FROM "GITHUB_REPOS"."SAMPLE_FILES" f
JOIN "GITHUB_REPOS"."SAMPLE_CONTENTS" c ON f."id" = c."id"
WHERE f."path" ILIKE '%.r'
GROUP BY f."repo_name" ORDER BY "library_count" DESC;
solved_subquestions_list: Join SAMPLE_FILES and SAMPLE_CONTENTS filtering for files ending with '.py' or '.r'.
Extract and count Python modules and R libraries from the content.
